title: lazarolus aria
intro: Lazarolus aria, also known as the Aria or Aria shrub, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayas. It is a shrub that belongs to the family of Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. The medicinal properties of Lazarolus aria are attributed to its essential oils, which are rich in flavonoids, limonoids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts.
